15:["$","$L1a",null,{"item":{"id":29,"slug":"overwhelm-recovery","title":"Overwhelm Recovery","desc":"A prioritisation framework, a daily + weekly schedule template, three focus habits, and platform-specific tool picks.","category":"productivity","difficulty":"beginner","tags":["productivity","time-management","beginner-friendly","1-hour"],"prompt":"\"I feel overwhelmed. I am [role] and struggle with [specific problem].\n\nPlease help me:\n1. Prioritize tasks using a simple framework\n2. Create a daily/weekly schedule template\n3. Suggest 3 focus habits\n4. Recommend tools for [Mac/Windows/Phone]\"","source":"","dateAdded":"2025-01-01","outcome":"A prioritisation framework, a daily + weekly schedule template, three focus habits, and platform-specific tool picks.","inputs":[{"label":"role"},{"label":"specific problem"},{"label":"Mac/Windows/Phone"}],"tools":["ChatGPT"],"est_time":"1 hour","output_kind":"templates","sample_output":"**Prioritisation (Eisenhower + energy)**\n1. Urgent + important + high-energy first hour\n2. Important not urgent → schedule into deep-work blocks\n3. Urgent not important → batch into a 30-min slot\n4. Neither → delete, don't defer\n\n**Daily template**\n- 09:00–10:30 — Deep work block 1 (Slack off, phone away)\n- 10:30–11:00 — Email / Slack triage\n- 11:00–12:30 — Deep work block 2\n- Afternoon: meetings + lighter work\n\n**Habits:** (1) inbox-zero by 17:00, (2) one weekly review, (3) 50-min focus, 10-min reset.\n\n**Mac tools:** Things 3, Cron, Raycast.","best_llm":"Claude Haiku 4.5","llm_reason":"Snappy responses for note-taking and scheduling","confidence":"$undefined","region":"$undefined","last_verified":"$undefined","related_tools":["claude","chatgpt","notion-ai"]},"catColor":"#8FE3D2"}]

Urgent + important + high-energy first hour\n2. Important not urgent → schedule into deep-work blocks\n3. Urgent not important → batch into a 30-min slot\n4. Neither → delete, don't defer\n\n**Daily template**\n- 09:00–10:30 — Deep work block 1 (Slack off, phone away)\n- 10:30–11:00 — Email / Slack triage\n- 11:00–12:30 — Deep work block 2\n- Afternoon: meetings + lighter work\n\n**Habits:** (1) inbox-zero by 17:00, (2) one weekly review, (3) 50-min focus, 10-min reset.\n\n**Mac tools:** Things 3, Cron, Raycast."}]]}]
